sentences.target: Heute esse ich Müesli mit Banane.

translations.de: Heute esse ich Müesli mit Banane.
translations.en: Today I’m eating muesli with banana.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je mange du muesli avec de la banane.
translations.it: Oggi mangio del muesli con banana.
translations.ko: 오늘 바나나와 함께 뮤즐리를 먹고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我吃加香蕉的麦片。
translations.ru: Сегодня я ем мюсли с бананом.
translations.pt: Hoje estou comendo muesli com banana.
translations.he: היום אני אוכל מוזלי עם בננה.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi ăn muesli với chuối.
translations.nl: Vandaag eet ik muesli met banaan.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я їм мюслі з бананом.
translations.hi: आज मैं केले के साथ म्यूसली खा रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag spiser jeg müsli med banan.
translations.id: Hari ini aku makan muesli dengan pisang.
translations.sv: I dag äter jag müsli med banan.
translations.da: I dag spiser jeg müsli med banan.
translations.ja: 今日はバナナ入りのミューズリーを食べています。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb in sentence-initial position; sets time frame and triggers verb-second word order.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present indicative); main predicate in V2 position.
Personal pronoun (1st person singular, nominative); subject of the clause.
Common noun (neuter, mass/uncountable); direct object of 'esse' (accusative).
Preposition that governs the dative; introduces a comitative/associative PP.
Common noun (feminine singular); complement of 'mit' (dative), specifying accompaniment.

translations.en: She is buying muesli at the supermarket.
translations.es: Ella compra muesli en el supermercado.
translations.fr: Elle achète du muesli au supermarché.
translations.it: Lei compra del muesli al supermercato.
translations.pt: Ela está comprando muesli no supermercado.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang mua muesli ở siêu thị.
translations.nl: Ze koopt muesli in de supermarkt.
translations.hi: वह सुपरमार्केट में म्यूसली खरीद रही है.
translations.ro: Ea cumpără muesli de la supermarket.
translations.ja: 彼女はスーパーでミューズリーを買っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; likely 3rd person singular feminine (nominative) as subject; could also be formal 'Sie' (2nd person).
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present indicative); main predicate.
Common noun (neuter, mass/uncountable); direct object of 'kauft' (accusative).
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); locative use governing the dative.
Common noun (masculine singular, dative here via 'im'); locative complement specifying place of purchase.

sentences.target: Morgen bringen wir Müesli für alle.

translations.de: Morgen bringen wir Müesli für alle.
translations.en: Tomorrow we’ll bring muesli for everyone.
translations.fr: Demain, nous apporterons du muesli pour tout le monde.
translations.it: Domani porteremo del muesli per tutti.
translations.ko: 내일 모두를 위해 뮤즐리를 가져올 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天我们会带麦片给大家。
translations.yue: 聽日我哋會帶麥片畀大家。
translations.ru: Завтра мы принесём мюсли для всех.
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos levar muesli para todo mundo.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi sẽ mang muesli cho mọi người.
translations.nl: Morgen nemen we muesli mee voor iedereen.
translations.uk: Завтра ми принесемо мюслі для всіх.
translations.hi: कल हम सबके लिए म्यूसली लाएँगे.
translations.el: Αύριο θα φέρουμε μούσλι για όλους.
translations.nb: I morgen tar vi med müsli til alle.
translations.id: Besok kami akan membawa muesli untuk semua orang.
translations.sv: I morgon tar vi med müsli till alla.
translations.ro: Mâine aducem muesli pentru toată lumea.
translations.da: I morgen tager vi müsli med til alle.
translations.ja: 明日、みんなのためにミューズリーを持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; sets future time reference and occupies the prefield, yielding verb-second order.
Finite verb (1st person plural, present indicative); main predicate in V2 position.
Personal pronoun (1st person plural, nominative); subject.
Common noun (neuter, mass/uncountable); direct object of 'bringen' (accusative).
Preposition governing the accusative; marks beneficiary/recipient.
Indefinite pronoun (plural, accusative as object of 'für'); denotes the set of recipients.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder mag Müesli ohne Zucker.

translations.de: Mein Bruder mag Müesli ohne Zucker.
translations.en: My brother likes muesli without sugar.
translations.es: A mi hermano le gusta el muesli sin azúcar.
translations.fr: Mon frère aime le muesli sans sucre.
translations.it: A mio fratello piace il muesli senza zucchero.
translations.ko: 제 남동생은 설탕 없는 뮤즐리를 좋아해요.
translations.ru: Мой брат любит мюсли без сахара.
translations.pt: Meu irmão gosta de muesli sem açúcar.
translations.vi: Em trai tôi thích muesli không đường.
translations.nl: Mijn broer houdt van muesli zonder suiker.
translations.uk: Мій брат любить мюслі без цукру.
translations.hu: A fiútestvérem szereti a cukor nélküli müzlit.
translations.hi: मेरे भाई को बिना चीनी वाली म्यूसली पसंद है.
translations.pl: Mój brat lubi musli bez cukru.
translations.el: Στον αδερφό μου αρέσει μούσλι χωρίς ζάχαρη.
translations.nb: Broren min liker müsli uten sukker.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya suka muesli tanpa gula.
translations.sv: Min bror gillar müsli utan socker.
translations.ro: Fratelui meu îi place muesli fără zahăr.
translations.cs: Můj bratr má rád müsli bez cukru.
translations.da: Min bror kan lide müsli uden sukker.
translations.ja: 兄は砂糖なしのミューズリーが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with masculine singular noun 'Bruder' in nominative.
Common noun (masculine singular, nominative); head of the subject NP.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present indicative); main predicate expressing preference.
Common noun (neuter, mass/uncountable); direct object of 'mag' (accusative).
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a negative accompaniment PP.
Common noun (masculine singular, accusative as object of 'ohne'); complements the PP modifying 'Müesli'.

Tomorrow we’ll bring muesli for everyone.
My brother likes muesli without sugar.
